MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Respresented by Sabrina Hall. Attorney Bill Ford appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendant Latasha Frazier is present.
Attorney Richard Smoke representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsel and litigants confer in D501.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of FEB-06-2012 is vacated.
